articles.title: GitHub Copilot Gets Smarter with GPT-5
articles.summary: GitHub Copilot now leverages GPT-5 for more accurate code suggestions, improved context understanding, and multi-file awareness across your projects.
articles.author: Sarah Chen

articles.title: New Security Advisory Database Expansion
articles.summary: The GitHub Advisory Database now covers over 200,000 vulnerabilities across all major ecosystems, including improved Rust and Go coverage.
articles.author: Marcus Rivera

articles.title: Actions Performance Improvements: 3x Faster Builds
articles.summary: We have optimized GitHub Actions runners to deliver up to 3x faster build times with improved caching and parallelism for CI/CD workflows.
articles.author: Priya Patel

articles.title: VS Code January Release Highlights
articles.summary: The January release of Visual Studio Code brings sticky scroll improvements, new terminal features, and enhanced remote development support.
articles.author: João Moreno

articles.title: Open Source Friday: Celebrating Community Contributors
articles.summary: This week we spotlight outstanding community contributors who are making open source projects better for everyone through documentation and mentorship.
articles.author: Lisa Park

articles.title: GitHub Universe 2024 Recap and Key Announcements
articles.summary: A comprehensive recap of GitHub Universe 2024, covering major product launches, developer keynotes, and the roadmap for the year ahead.
articles.author: Thomas Dohmke
